description: Tested header navigation in mobile viewport (375x812). All links (Home, Blog, Portfolio, Videos, Contact) were present, but the 'Blog' and 'Contact' links inconsistently route to incorrect paths ('/blgo' and '/contcat') resulting in 404 errors.

issues.name: Contact link has wrong route and results in 404
issues.description: Expected: The "Contact" link in the header should route to "/contact". Actual: The "Contact" link in the header routes to "/contcat", which results in a 404 error page.
reproductionSteps: Locate the "Contact" link in the header navigation.
issues.expectedBehavior: The "Contact" link in the header should route to "/contact".
issues.actualBehavior: The "Contact" link in the header routes to "/contcat", which results in a 404 error page.

issues.name: Blog link has wrong route and results in 404
issues.description: Expected: The "Blog" link in the header should route to "/blog". Actual: The "Blog" link in the header routes to "/blgo", which results in a 404 error page.
reproductionSteps: Locate the "Blog" link in the header navigation.
issues.expectedBehavior: The "Blog" link in the header should route to "/blog".
issues.actualBehavior: The "Blog" link in the header routes to "/blgo", which results in a 404 error page.
